features: ULTRA-SOFT TEXTURE: Experience unparalleled softness with every touch. Each cotton ball in our pack of 100 is designed to be gentle on even the most sensitive skin, making it perfect for your daily skincare and makeup routines.
100% PURE COTTON: Each cotton wool ball is made from high-grade, 100% pure cotton, ensuring a natural and hypoallergenic experience for all skin types.

HIGHLY-ABSORBENT: Whether it's removing nail polish, applying astringents, or applying facial products, our cotton balls measures approximately 3cm, offer superior absorbency to ensure a clean, efficient application every time.

ESSENTIAL BEAUTY TOOL: Essential for any beauty regimen, these hypoallergenic cotton wool balls are a must-have in your makeup kit, bathroom vanity, or first aid kit for versatile home and personal care applications.

GENTLE FOR ALL SKIN TYPES: Our cotton wool balls are gentle enough to be used on all skin types, including sensitive and delicate skin. They are free from chemicals and additives, making them safe for everyday use.
description: Product Description Simply Soft Cotton Wool Balls Absorbent 100 pack Directions Open package, remove cotton wool ball, apply to skin, gentle dab or wipe Safety Warning No warning applicable See more
